job_title: Analyst/Senior Analyst, Brand Marketing (Marketing Analytics, Bangkok Based, Relocation provided)
weaknesses: No explicit A/B testing experience listed
No explicit p-value or formal statistical testing examples
Brand research or agency collaboration not shown
improvement_bullets: Conducted A/B testing on marketing campaigns, utilizing statistical analysis (including p-values and regression) to measure the impact on conversion and brand awareness.
Managed performance of digital marketing campaigns across Meta and YouTube, optimizing media spend against KPIs and delivering reports to stakeholders.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to integrate campaign data from platforms like Meta and YouTube to inform strategy and increase marketing ROI.
Leveraged statistical methods such as data normalization and regression modeling to refine customer segmentation and enhance brand research initiatives.
Managed end-to-end project measurement and planning, utilizing marketing data to drive actionable insights for brand optimization.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Analyst, Brand Marketing (Marketing Analytics, Bangkok Based, Relocation provided) opportunity with Agoda. I am interested in this opportunity because of Agoda’s industry-leading position in using data-driven technology to bridge the world through travel. What interests me about working for Agoda is its culture of curiosity and innovation, which inspires me because I am passionate about translating complex data into meaningful brand strategies. I believe my expertise in SQL and Tableau and my background in campaign measurement would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by focusing on how data architecture directly impacts business outcomes. In fact, at Shine Masters, I designed a 12-month marketing strategy fueled by time-series modeling and customer segmentation. This initiative resulted in a 300% increase in new customer acquisition. Ultimately, I know that the Analyst, Brand Marketing role at Agoda would allow me to bring my proficiency in A/B testing and statistical analysis to drive impactful brand research. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst & Operations Lead at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my project management skills. I led the transition to automated dashboards, reducing data processing time by 40% and freeing up resources for high-priority lead generation. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my data storytelling skills in working on digital and social media campaigns at Agoda. I know that my analytical rigor and campaign management experience align with what it takes to succeed at the Analyst, Brand Marketing role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
